items.name: R.M. Company — Deep Green Outerwear
items.description: This deep green jacket represents the structured calm that defines R.M. Company. Designed for those who move with intention, it balances utility with quiet design. Clean lines, subtle finishes, and a grounded color make this piece a modern essential — built to last, built to mean something.
